headline: Avery Dennison and TEXAID RFID pilot triples textile sorting speed
summary: A joint project carried out by Avery Dennison and TEXAID has found that RFID technology can triple textile sorting speed compared to manual methods, while achieving up to 99.9% identification accuracy.
